comments.author: @TheLivingWorld9
comments.text: The Azores look absolutely breathtaking. I love how this documentary captures not only the stunning volcanic landscapes and the Atlantic Ocean, but also the peaceful lifestyle and rich traditions of the local people. A truly hidden paradise that deserves more attention

comments.author: @luismonteiro1388
comments.text:
Nós Açorianos Atalantes agradecemos á Mãe Natureza todos os dias . 
30.000 sismos não é fácil ., calma.
4.100 sismos por ano é o correto , e em média sentimos 30/40 por ano .

comments.author: @asimshahzad3783
comments.text: If you want to explore the Heaven on Earth just go Pakistan northern region

comments.author: @NovaTerrain-4K
comments.text: Was anyone else completely amazed by the segment where locals bury the Cozido stew in the ground to let the volcano cook it for 6 hours? If you had the chance to visit the Azores, would you dare to try a meal cooked entirely by geothermal heat, or would the smell of sulfur make you a bit hesitant?
